report_metadata.author: IntersectMCC (Membership & Community Committee)

data_sources.name: Milestone Acceptance Forms (MAF)
data_sources.description: DocuSign-verified milestone documentation submitted to billing@intersectmbo.org

key_updates.content: Japan and LATAM hubs already operational; hub applications opening for expansion beyond these two regions
Japan first Town Hall held May 14; Brazil governance workshop May 20
Sri Lanka Hub officially launched; Japan at NexTech Week Tokyo; LATAM launching X account @IntersectLatam
WADA (Africa) announced as fourth hub; LATAM first Town Hall May 31
LATAM Town Hall had 30+ attendees with JJ Siler and Jack Briggs; Japan 2nd X Space 50+ members; Sri Lanka X Space scheduled June 8
Japan in-person launch June 14 Tokyo with 54+ registrations, COO Nigel Hemsley and Nick Cook attended; Sri Lanka X Space June 8 had 557 participants
Sri Lanka First Town Hall June 29; Japan LINE Live Talk June 24 with 28 participants; Discord surpassed 1,000 members
Sri Lanka First Town Hall had 69 attendees; Japan X Space July 1 had 298 participants; WADA First Town Hall July 4 had 25 attendees
WADA Central Africa (Goma) pre-launch scheduled July 13; LATAM at Blockchain.RIO July 24-25 and ADN Argentina July 31
Brazil sub-hub launched at Blockchain.rio (Manager: OtÃ¡vio Lima); Argentina sub-hub launched at ADN (70 new members); Central Africa (Goma) launched with 80+ participants
Japan constitutional workshops Aug 10 (Osaka) and Aug 31 (Tokyo); WADA West Africa launch Aug 10 Ghana
35% of all individual memberships attributed to hubs; Japan surpassed 170 individual members (highest of any country); Japan X Space Aug 16 had 206 participants
Clay Nation (Europe Hub) launched in Portugal; LATAM at NFT.Brasil; Japan at Tech for Impact Summit with Charles Hoskinson; 1,000+ members in under 4 months; 40+ workshops delivered
USA Hub (AWEN) launched this week - first US-based hub; WADA East Africa (Nairobi) launch Sept 14; LATAM Colombia sub-hub launched Sept 14
AMM schedule announced: Tokyo Oct 3, Lisbon Oct 5, Ghana Oct 11, Colombo Oct 12, Mexico Oct 17, Austin Oct 19; Mexico hub launched at UNAM
Japan AMM Oct 3 had 69 attendees; AWEN first Town Hall Oct 2; 1,500+ paid members achieved
Europe AMM successful; Sri Lanka university workshop Oct 8 with University of Kelaniya
AMM events: Japan 34, Sri Lanka 141 (TV coverage, radio 150k listeners), Africa Accra 34; Sri Lanka Hub Manager on Lite 878 radio
AMM launches: North America Austin ~30, LATAM Mexico; Japan X Space 44 attendees; Africa Town Hall Oct 24
Sri Lanka Town Hall 48 attendees; Mexico Hub Launch at UNAM; Hyderabad 250+ attendees, 130 new members
Town Halls: LATAM Spanish 84, Portuguese 124; Europe 155; North America 33; Africa 22
Japan Blockchain Expo Chiba - 300 flyers distributed; Sri Lanka Town Hall Nov 23
Sri Lanka Town Hall 102 attendees; Africa 18; Europe 52
Sri Lanka 105 attendees; North America GM 2025 (44 in-person, 22 virtual, 3000 viewers); Uruguay Hub Launch
Uruguay launch Punta del Este; Africa 12; North America 42
First Inter-Regional Hub Town Hall 110 attendees; Africa WADA Forum 57; North America 248; Sri Lanka Kelaniya 81, Ruhuna 194 students
Budget workshops all hubs: Sri Lanka 21+41; Africa DRC 11, Cameroon, Nairobi; Europe 7; North America 8
Community Hubs wrap-up: Japan 30% of memberships, 20+ meetups; North America 300+ X Space attendees; direct hub management concluded

data_sources.name: Community Hubs Documentation
data_sources.note: Hub applications opened May 2024; program transitioned to community-led operations in 2025

report_metadata.data_completeness: Comprehensive - MAF documents + Development Report KPIs + Development Update timeline

community_hubs_program.mission: Community hubs exist to accelerate Cardano adoption through local engagement, education, and ecosystem development.
community_hubs_program.vision: A thriving global network of sustainable community hubs, driving blockchain innovation and adoption.
community_hubs_program.purpose: Hubs serve as a bridge between local and global Cardano communities, enabling decentralized governance participation, impactful project development, and strengthening the global Cardano network.
requirements: Host monthly townhalls (similar to Intersect or Catalyst models)
Maintain a Discord channel for activity updates
Appoint a dedicated hub manager overseeing operations and budget
Report updates to the global community

working_group.name: MCC Community Hubs Working Group (CHWG)
focus_areas: Application and Selection Criteria for New Hubs
Refining the Hub Structure Over Time

hub_launch_timeline.note: Hub applications closed; program transitioned to community-led operations in 2025

hubs.impact_summary: Launched 5 sub-hubs across Latin America, hosted major events at Blockchain Rio (112 registrations) and ADN Argentina (500+ audience), and established monthly bilingual town halls in Spanish and Portuguese. Successfully transitioned leadership while maintaining momentum in regional growth.

hubs.impact_summary: Achieved ~30% of all Intersect individual memberships (533 individual members as of March 2025; was 492 in August 2024 per Update #28) from Japan alone. Hosted 20+ local meetups across 6 cities, comprehensive Japanese translations of governance documents, and weekly X Spaces. Successfully hosted Charles Hoskinson for Tech for Impact Summit and Tokyo Tech Lecture.

hubs.impact_summary: First Intersect Hub in South Asia. Achieved 557 participants in a single X Space event. Hosted the first inter-regional hub town hall with 110 participants from all 6 hubs. Organized UniHack 2025 with 225+ developers across 18 universities. Produced multilingual content in English, Tamil, and Sinhala.

hubs.impact_summary: Launched localized hubs in Ghana, Kenya, and DRC with 584 attendees at the three sub-hub launches (1,391 total across all WADA events). Facilitated multi-language support (English, French, Swahili) and active DRep engagement discussions. 96 attendees at CC Elections X Space and 124 at African DReps governance panel.

hubs.impact_summary: First US-based Intersect community hub. Hosted first DRep Debate of 2025 at GM2025 Fort Myers with 3,000+ livestream viewers. X Spaces reaching 326 attendees. Featured enterprise speakers from Book.io/Stuff.io, ClarityDAO, SundaeSwap, Rare Network. Hosted Cardano X Consensus 2025 in Toronto. Budget Proposal Workshop series with community feedback submitted to gov.tools.

membership_statistics.hub_membership_contribution: 35% of all individual memberships attributed to hubs

overall_summary.hub_management_note: Intersect's direct management of the six community hubs concluded in 2025, with town halls shifting to community-hub-led format

roi_analysis.methodology: USD-denominated Phase 1 contracts only (excludes ADA contracts to avoid exchange rate assumptions)

usd_hubs_only.events_note: NA event count was updated from 12 (March 2025 snapshot) to 18 (NA hub's own end-of-program KPI rollup). Other USD hubs use the March 2025 snapshot figure and may also undercount Phase 2 activity.

program_wide_metrics.cost_per_attendee_note: $125,000 (USD hubs minus Sri Lanka's $36K) divided by 27,279 adjusted attendees. Sri Lanka is excluded from both numerator and denominator because its 165,122-attendee figure reflects total reach of large conferences/radio coverage, not hub-organized attendance.
program_wide_metrics.avg_monthly_cost_per_hub_note: $161,000 / 61.6 hub-months. Per-hub durations: Japan 14, LATAM 13, SL 13, WADA 12, NA 9.4. Range: $2,000/mo (Japan) to $3,231/mo (LATAM). NA = $2,660/mo.
program_wide_metrics.avg_contract_per_hub_note: $161,000 Phase 1 USD / 5 USD-contracted hubs (Europe excluded — ADA contract)
program_wide_metrics.pct_intersect_members_in_hub_regions_not: 1,268 hub individual members / ~1,799 total Intersect individual members per March 2025 Existing Community Hubs Report. The August 2024 '35% of members attributed to hubs' figure (Update #28) is a different metric (direct recruitment) and is not directly comparable.

north_america.events_source: NA hub's own end-of-program KPI rollup (kpis.total_hub_events). Was 12 in the March 12, 2025 snapshot.

monthly_requirements: Host at least one X Space
Update Status Report per Hub Shapers Handbook
Update events tracker per Hub Shapers Handbook
